/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/flux-run.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/flux-run.dir/src/cli/flux_run.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/flux-run.dir/src/runtime/ngspice_bridge.cpp.o" -o flux-run  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib:/home/jnd/qt_projects/fluxscript/build_local:/usr/lib/llvm-21/lib: /usr/local/lib/libngspice.so libFluxScript.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/llvm-21/lib/libLLVM-21.so /usr/local/lib/libngspice.so
